title: Marbled's Weather2 Retextured
description: A resource pack that retextures and modernizes the Weather2 textures
body:
## **Marbled's Weather2 Retextured**
![mw3r](https://i.postimg.cc/4ysqshNY/mw2r.gif)

Weather2 Retextured is a resource pack that retextures the [Weather Storms & Tornadoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/weather-storms-tornadoes) mod to fit with the 1.13+ vanilla texture style.

## **Features**
- Retextured items and blocks!
- Animated block textures for the Tornado Sensor, Weather Deflector and Weather Forecast.

### **Usage**
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this resource pack or its assets ANYWHERE.
